Request body to obtain a chart from a backtest. The /backtests/chart/read API accepts requests in the following format:

ReadBacktestChartRequest Model - Request body to obtain a chart from a backtest.
projectId integer
required
example: 12345678
Id of the project that contains the backtest.
backtestId string
required
example: 2a748c241eb93b0b57b4747b3dacc80e
Id of the backtest for this chart request.
name string
required
example: Strategy Equity
The requested chart name.
count integer
required
example: 100
The number of data points to request.
start integer
required
example: 1717801200
The start timestamp of the request in Unix time.
end integer
required
example: 1743462000
The end timestamp of the request in Unix time.
Example 
{
  "projectId": 12345678,
  "backtestId": "2a748c241eb93b0b57b4747b3dacc80e",
  "name": "Strategy Equity",
  "count": 100,
  "start": 1717801200,
  "end": 1743462000
}
